settings.heading: Shipping & delivery
settings.body: We keep one promise everywhere: 2–3 business days to prepare your order, then hand-off to our trusted carriers. Use the timeline below to share transparent expectations with shoppers.

settings.question: When do I get tracking?
settings.answer: Tracking goes out as soon as the parcel leaves our partner facility. If you ordered multiple items, we may split the shipment and send separate tracking links.

settings.question: Do you offer express options?
settings.answer: Express service unlocks automatically for destinations where carriers can guarantee faster delivery. If it is available for your address, the option appears during checkout.
